title: Department Manager Vacancy at Apollo Pharmacy - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Apollo Pharmacy - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Apollo Pharmacy in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Apollo Pharmacy:
Apollo Pharmacy is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Pharmacy!
